# Clean Collective Cleaning Services

Clean Collective is a licensed, insured professional house cleaning company serving 40+ cities across South Florida including Fort Lauderdale, Boca Raton, West Palm Beach, Miami, and surrounding Broward, Miami-Dade, and Palm Beach counties.

## What We Do

We provide residential and commercial cleaning services including:
- Standard Cleaning (from $118)
- Deep Cleaning (from $208)
- Move-In / Move-Out Cleaning (from $283)
- Airbnb / Short-Term Rental Turnover Cleaning (from $95)
- Carpet Cleaning (custom quote)
- Upholstery Cleaning (custom quote)
- Office / Commercial Cleaning (from $150)
- Post-Construction Cleaning (custom quote)

## Why Choose Clean Collective

- Licensed and fully insured
- Background-checked cleaners
- Eco-friendly, non-toxic products
- 4.9/5 stars from 127+ verified reviews
- Satisfaction guarantee (free re-clean within 24 hours if anything missed)
- Transparent pricing — no hidden fees
- Same-day booking available
- 7-day scheduling (Mon–Sun)

## Pricing Summary

Standard Cleaning: $118–$368 (by home size)
Deep Cleaning: $208–$500
Move In/Out Cleaning: $283–$600
Airbnb Turnover: $95–$280

Full pricing details: https://cleancollectives.com/house-cleaning-cost-south-florida
Machine-readable pricing: https://cleancollectives.com/pricing.md

Recurring discounts:
- Weekly: 15% off per visit
- Bi-weekly: 10% off per visit
- Monthly: 5% off per visit

## Service Areas

Broward County: Fort Lauderdale, Hollywood, Pompano Beach, Coral Springs, Deerfield Beach, Plantation, Sunrise, Weston, Davie, Pembroke Pines, Miramar, Coconut Creek, Margate, Hallandale Beach, Parkland, Cooper City, Oakland Park, Wilton Manors, Tamarac, Lauderhill

Miami-Dade County: Miami, Miami Beach, Hialeah, Coral Gables, North Miami, North Miami Beach, Aventura, Sunny Isles Beach, Doral, Homestead, Miami Gardens

Palm Beach County: Boca Raton, West Palm Beach, Delray Beach, Boynton Beach, Lake Worth, Jupiter, Palm Beach Gardens, Wellington, Royal Palm Beach

## Contact

Phone: (561) 861-2752
Email: support@cleancollectives.com
Address: 4611 N Federal Hwy, Pompano Beach, FL 33064
Book online: https://cleancollectives.com/#booking

Hours:
- Monday–Friday: 7:00 AM – 7:00 PM
- Saturday: 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM
- Sunday: 9:00 AM – 3:00 PM

## Pages

- [Homepage](/): Instant quotes, booking, and overview of Clean Collective cleaning services.
- [Book Now](/#booking): Multi-step booking form with live pricing.
- [Pricing Guide](/house-cleaning-cost-south-florida): Full breakdown of cleaning costs by service and home size.
- [FAQ](/faq): Answers to common cleaning, scheduling, and pricing questions.
- [Blog](/blog): Cleaning guides, tips, and city-specific resources.
- [Service Areas](/service-areas): Every city and neighborhood we serve in South Florida.
- [Standard Cleaning](/standard-cleaning): Recurring weekly, bi-weekly, monthly maintenance cleaning.
- [Deep Cleaning](/deep-cleaning): Top-to-bottom detailed clean for first-time or seasonal service.
- [Move-In/Out Cleaning](/move-in-out-cleaning): Empty-home clean for renters, buyers, and sellers.
- [Airbnb Cleaning](/airbnb-cleaning): Short-term rental turnover service for hosts.
- [Carpet Cleaning](/carpet-cleaning): Deep extraction carpet and rug cleaning.
- [Office Cleaning](/office-cleaning): Commercial cleaning for offices and small businesses.
- [Post-Construction Cleaning](/post-construction-cleaning): Debris and dust removal after renovations.
- [Broward County](/broward-county-cleaning): Service overview for Broward County cities.
- [Miami-Dade](/miami-dade-cleaning): Service overview for Miami-Dade County cities.
- [Palm Beach County](/palm-beach-county-cleaning): Service overview for Palm Beach County cities.
- [Reviews](/reviews): Verified customer reviews and ratings.
- [Referral Program](/referral-program): Earn credits when friends book.
- [Cleaner Application](/apply): Apply to join the Clean Collective cleaning team.
